ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game is played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "stadium_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the stadium where the game is played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the game starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the game ends */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substitutions" (
  "sub_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each substitution */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game where the substitution occurs */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Inning number during which the substitution takes place */,
  "sub_home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being substituted in */,
  "sub_lineup_id" INTEGER /* Lineup ID of the player being substituted out */,
  "sub_fld_cd" INTEGER /* Field code indicating the position of the new player */,
  "sub_out_id" TEXT /* ID of the player being substituted out */,
  "sub_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the substitution (e.g., injury, tactical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_sub_out_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_out_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_sub_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_home_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game where the event occurs */,
  "line_number_ct" INTEGER /* Line number of the event entry in the data file */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Inning number during which the event occurs */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the time of the event */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the time of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "coach_id" TEXT /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the home stadium of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "removed_players" (
  "removed_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each removed player */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game where the player was removed */,
  "removed_fld_cd" INTEGER /* Field code indicating the position of the removed player */,
  "reason_removed" TEXT /* Reason why the player was removed (e.g., injury, foul) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("removed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_removed_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game for which the lineup is prepared */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Home team lineup identifier */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Away team lineup identifier */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player in the lineup */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the lineup */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., substitution, score, foul) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
